Helicopter </li></ul></div><h1 class="main-title">Helicopters for Sale</h1><h2 class="main-sub-title"><p>Helicopters, otherwise referred to as rotorcraft utilize rotor blades that propel quickly enough to provide the lift needed for flight. Unique from fixed-wing aircraft, helicopters are capable of vertical take-off and landing, making them ideal to operate into and out of tight spaces, and hovering (making them ideal for surveillance and inspection work).</p><p>&nbsp;A wide range of <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/helicopter/turbine" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">turbine helicopters</a> and <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/helicopter/piston" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">piston helicopters</a> are operated around the world, fulfilling an equally wide range of missions. The smallest manned piston helicopters seat just two people (including the pilot), whereas the largest multi-engine turbine helicopters can be configured to carry more than 12 passengers in luxury (plus crew).</p><p>&nbsp;However, the key difference between turbine and piston helicopters, reflected in their name, is in their engine types&hellip;</p></h2><div class="text-center read-more-dtl" ><a href="#" class="read-more">Read More</a></div><div class="multi-search hide"><a href="/sell-my-aircraft" id="post_ad_btn" class="button dark-green-btn"><span class="speaker-icon"></span> Advertise Your Aircraft Now</a></div></div></div><div id="item_search_location_modal" class="reveal" data-reveal><h2 class="modal-title">
Invalid location
</h2><div id="item_search_location" class="">
Sorry no location available with such name.
</div><button class="close-button" data-close="" aria-label="Close modal" id="item_search_location_close" type="button"><span aria-hidden="true">×</span></button><div class="modal-buttons clearfix text-center"><button id="noClicked" class="button secondary" data-close>Close</button></div></div></div><div class="common-white-box "><div class="fa-lsize relative"><div id="message_div"></div><div In this respect AVB has proven being the number one in both effective customer support and number of responses related to our advertisements!"</p><div class="post-name">Hugo Munthe-Kaas</div></div><div class="slide"><p>As a first-time user of AvBuyer I was not sure of the exposure, or support I would receive with my listing. When I reached out to a former fellow Vermonter David Olcott, I knew I had made the right decision in choosing AvBuyer as our marketing platform. It could not have been easier. action="/create/searchalerts"><div class="grid-x grid-margin-x align-middle align-right"><div class="large-6 cell"><div class="alert-footer-title ">
Alert me by email for new listings of <b>Helicopters</b></div></div><div class="large-6 cell"><div class="input-group"><input type="email" id="alert_me2" name="alert_me2" placeholder="Email"><div class="input-group-button"><button id="submit_alert_me2" name="submit_alert_me2" class="alert_me_button button expanded blue-btn" type="submit" value="Submit" disabled><span class=right-arrow-white></span></button></div></div></div><div class="large-6 cell"><div class="" data-closable="" id="success_alert2"></div></div></div></form><div class="close-btn"><button class="model-close-btn hide-for-large" aria-label="Dismiss alert" type="button" data-close="" id="alert-close"><span aria-hidden="true">Close</span></button></div></div><div class="grid-x align-middle list-paging"><div class="large-4 cell show-for-large showing-page">Showing 1 - 20 of 362</div><div class="large-8 cell"><div class="pagination-wrap"><ul class="pagination" role="navigation" aria-label="Pagination"><li class="pagination-previous disabled" >Previous<span class="show-for-sr">page</span></li><li class="current">1<span class="show-for-sr">You're on page</span></li><li><a href="/aircraft/helicopter/page-2" >2</a></li><li><a href="/aircraft/helicopter/page-3" >3</a></li><li><a href="/aircraft/helicopter/page-4" >4</a></li><li class="ellipsis"></li><li><a href="/aircraft/helicopter/page-19" >19</a></li><li class="pagination-next"><a href="/aircraft/helicopter/page-2" rel="next">Next<span class="show-for-sr">page</span></a></li></ul></div></div></div><!-- Dealer Enquiry --></div></div><div class="faq-private-jet"><div class="faq-head"><h2>FAQs: Helicopter for Sale</h2></div><div class="sky-blue-head">Here are the most Frequently Asked Questions for Helicopter for sale</div><ul class="fa-no-bullet"><li><h4 class="faq-question">Which are the top helicopter manufacturer companies today?</h4><p class="faq-answer">Today’s leading turbine helicopter manufacturers include Airbus, Bell, Enstrom, Leonardo, MD Helicopter, Robinson, and Sikorsky. Buyers shopping the pre-owned market will find additional out-of-production models available, including those produced by Agusta, Eurocopter, and others.

Popular piston helicopters are built by Enstrom (F-28F and 280FX), Guimbal (Cabri G2), Robinson (R22 and R44 Raven) and Schweizer (300C).

Again, buyers shopping the pre-owned piston helicopter market will find additional out-of-production models available, including, for example, the Bell 47.</p></li><li><h4 class="faq-question">What are helicopters used for?</h4><p class="faq-answer">Turbine helicopters are popular with corporations needing business and VVIP transportation. High-net-worth-individuals also own these aircraft as personal transportation.


Some of the other roles and industries Turbine Helicopters are commonly utilized in are police work, medevac, aerial surveillance, offshore, media, tourism and more.


Meanwhile, Piston helicopters are very popular with flight schools. They are also used for personal, owner-flown transportation, and are useful for certain types of surveillance work, tourism, site inspection, and news gathering.</p></li><li><h4 class="faq-question">How much do helicopters cost?</h4><p class="faq-answer">Buyers seeking a pre-owned turbine helicopter can expect an average ask price of $1.465m, according to JETNET data (April 2022) which accounts for new and used helicopter prices. The highest ask price in July 2021 was $9.950m.

Piston helicopters, meanwhile, can cost anywhere between under $68k up to approximately $708k (per JETNET), </p></li></ul></div><div class="jet-overview" id="jet-overview"><p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong><span style="font-size: 18px;">Helicopter Overview</span></strong></span></p><p style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgb(209, 174, 99); font-size: 14px;"><strong>By Matt Harris</strong></span></p><p><em><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);">Both Piston and Turbine helicopters are diverse and are used across a wide variety of roles and industries. These include executive travel, emergency services, military, construction, oil and offshore, tourism, search and rescue, news and media, and a diverse range of other aerial works.&nbsp;</span></em></p><p>Popular models available today include aircraft built by <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/helicopter/turbine/airbus-eurocopter" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Airbus Helicopters</a>, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/helicopter/turbine/bell-helicopters" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Bell</a>, Enstrom, Leonardo, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/helicopter/piston/robinson" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Robinson</a> and Sikorsky</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong>What is a Turbine Helicopter?</strong></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">Generally larger than piston helicopters, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/helicopter/turbine" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">turbine helicopters</a> are powered by one or more gas turbine engines. Comprised of compressor, combustion chamber, turbine and gearbox assembly, these are more powerful and complex engines than are used on piston helis, inevitably making them more expensive to operate but broadening their appeal to market sectors piston helicopters cannot serve.</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">&nbsp;</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">Popular turbine helicopter models on the market today carry anywhere between four and 20, -plus passengers (depending on category and configuration).</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">&nbsp;</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">Turbine helicopters tend to be grouped by engine and weight, including Single-Engine Turbines, Light Multi-Engine Turbines, Medium Multi-Engine Turbines, and Heavy Multi-Engine Turbines.</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">&nbsp;</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);"><strong>What is a Piston Helicopter?</strong></span></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">Generally smaller than turbine helicopters, <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/helicopter/piston" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">piston helicopters</a> operate with a piston engine (also called a reciprocating engine), with Lycoming being a leading piston helicopter engine manufacturer today. Less powerful and complex than the engines used by turbine helicopters, piston engines are also less expensive to operate.</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">&nbsp;</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">The popular piston helicopters on the new and pre-owned market carry between two and four people (including pilot), and have a range between 160 and 300 nautical miles (per Conklin &amp; de Decker).</p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><br></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><strong><span style="color: rgb(44, 130, 201);">Read more:</span></strong></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><br></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">Latest <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/helicopter-comparison" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Helicopter Comparison Articles</a></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;"><br></p><p dir="ltr" style="line-height:1.38;margin-top:0pt;margin-bottom:0pt;">Latest <a href="https://www.avbuyer.com/articles/helicopter-ownership" rel="noopener noreferrer" target="_blank">Helicopter Ownership Articles</a></p></div><div class="text-center hide-for-large"><a function renderReCaptchaalert_me()
{
$('#submit_alert_me').removeAttr('disabled');
(function () {
if ($('#submit_alert_me').length !== 0 ) {
grecaptcha.render('submit_alert_me', {
'sitekey': "6Ld6QigUAAAAABxtsBgzbJnOQStV7-jxIUSNsPae",
'callback': function (token) {
$('#submit_alert_me').closest('form').submit();
}
});

$('#submit_alert_me').trigger('itemInquirySubmitBtnState');
}
})();
}

function renderReCaptchaalert_me2()
{

}
});

}
})();
}

</script><script>
function loadYoutubeJs(){
var div, n,
v = document.getElementsByClassName("youtube-player");
for (n = 0; n < v.length; n++) {
if ($( v[n]).html() == '') {
div = document.createElement("div");
div.setAttribute("data-id", v[n].dataset.id);
div.innerHTML = labnolThumb(v[n].dataset.id);
div.onclick = labnolIframe;
v[n].appendChild(div);
}
}
$('.lazy_video').Lazy();
}

function labnolThumb(id) {
var thumb = '<picture class="lazy_video"><data-src srcset="https://i.ytimg.com/vi_webp/ID/maxresdefault.webp" type="image/webp"></data-src><data-src srcset="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/maxresdefault.jpg" type="image/jpeg"></data-src><data-img src="https://i.ytimg.com/vi/ID/maxresdefault.jpg" /></picture>',
play = '<div class="play"></div>';
return thumb.replace("ID", id).replace("ID", id).replace("ID", id) + play;
}

function labnolIframe() {
var iframe = document.createElement("iframe");
var embed = "https://www.youtube.com/embed/ID?autoplay=1&mute=1";
iframe.setAttribute("src", embed.replace("ID", this.dataset.id));
iframe.setAttribute("frameborder", "0");
iframe.setAttribute("allowfullscreen", "1");
this.parentNode.replaceChild(iframe, this);
}
$(document).ready(function() {
loadYoutubeJs();
});
</script><script type="text/javascript">
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
loadImages(entry.target, 1); // Strictly load 1 image per item initially
observer.unobserve(entry.target);
}
});
}, { rootMargin: "200px" });

function loadImages(slide, maxImages = 1) {
if (!slide) return;

// Get all images inside the current item
const pictures = slide.querySelectorAll(".img-cell picture");

// Ensure only 'maxImages' (1 initially) loads
pictures.forEach((picture, index) => {
if (index < maxImages) {
const img = picture.querySelector("img");
const sources = picture.querySelectorAll("source");

if (img && img.dataset.src) {
img.src = img.dataset.src;
img.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
sources.forEach(source => {
if (source.dataset.src) {
source.srcset = source.dataset.src;
source.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
});
}
});
}

function loadNextImage(slide) {
if (!slide) return;

// Get images that are still unloaded
const unloadedPictures = slide.querySelectorAll(".img-cell picture img[data-src]");

if (unloadedPictures.length > 0) {
const nextImg = unloadedPictures[0]; // Load only the next one
nextImg.src = nextImg.dataset.src;
nextImg.removeAttribute("data-src");

// Load sources inside <picture>
const sources = nextImg.closest("picture").querySelectorAll("source");
sources.forEach(source => {
if (source.dataset.src) {
source.srcset = source.dataset.src;
source.removeAttribute("data-src");
}
});
}
}

function loadInitialSlides(slick) {
const currentSlideIndex = slick.currentSlide || 0;

$('.slider-for .slick-slide').each(function (index) {
if (index === currentSlideIndex) {
loadImages(this, 1); // Load only 1 image for the first item
} else {
observer.observe(this); // Observer handles the rest on scroll
}
});
}

$('.slider-for').on('init', function (event, slick) {
setTimeout(() => loadInitialSlides(slick), 100); // Ensure Slick initializes first
}).slick({
initialSlide: 0,
slidesToShow: 1,
slidesToScroll: 1,
arrows: true,
dots: true,
fade: false,
lazyLoad: 'ondemand', // Ensure Slick doesn’t preload all images
infinite: false,
rows: 0,
});

$('.slider-for').on('afterChange', function (event, slick, currentSlide) {
const currentSlideEl = $('.slider-for .slick-slide').eq(currentSlide)[0];
loadNextImage(currentSlideEl); // Load only 1 new image per navigation
});
});


document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
const lazyContent = document.getElementById("avinodeApp");

// Function to dynamically load a script
const loadScript = (url) => {
return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
const script = document.createElement("script");
script.src = url;
script.type = "text/javascript";
script.async = true;

script.onload = () => {
resolve();
};
script.onerror = () => {
console.error(`Error loading ${url}`);
reject(new Error(`Script load error for ${url}`));
};

document.body.appendChild(script);
});
};

// Observer to detect when the content is in view
const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries, observer) => {
entries.forEach(entry => {
if (entry.isIntersecting) {
// Load third-party script when content becomes visible
loadScript("https://apps.avinode.com/webapp/rest/bootstrap?Avinode-WEB-APP=eyJraWQiOiIxNkVBQkQ5RS1BRjYyLTQ4NTEtODk5Qi1BM0UwMThGRjYxNDciLCJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJSUzUxMiJ9.eyJzdWIiOiI3MDJjMmRkZS1kYWMyLTQ3ZDAtYjNjOS02ZWM1MThlNWJkZmYiLCJhdmlkb21haW4iOiIuYXZpbm9kZS5jb20iLCJhdml0ZW5hbnQiOjExMzgwLCJpc3MiOiJhdmlub2RlIiwiYXZpdHlwZSI6MTAsImF2aW5vbmNlIjoiMTIyYTQxOGUtNjAyMS00NTYxLTliMDctZjM5YTllNzM4YWVkIn0.grYx3F0W_miFJ2NjbbdmAqEBg8oL0yukdeUIbageL_-2jewkcx6vsmG4kHZ0FshuyjH-8Vho5fSAArG9U3fQ1bYn7ZDA3t3vJp-mzhOaU3ryHKMksr2nROjAZilObNts_6RsyrQtbEBPJYgmCH9n9Skh3GbSkac9tKqjP7Ma_i0hx3SDHx889v4Q-pQHnUCguitkUbQsIPm-UNVDG-ci1qU16xURx1VvMDcaqy2wdumDt9A65QCj_BmYVBS13nRxbI1uegDG6SqLY5ACpoLVJeKdo37uibZS1c1VcF-hFHQ9jWpJbwO4Dbr5JK6zDfsPqBo_7wK0IQjgeKWGemOKEg&analyticsReferrer=https://www.flyingmag.com/")
.then(() => {
})
.catch((err) => {
console.error(err.message);
});

observer.unobserve(lazyContent); // Stop observing after loading
}
});
});

observer.observe(lazyContent);
});

</script><script language="javascript" type="text/javascript">

{
"@context": "https://schema.org",
"@graph": [
{
"@type": "FAQPage",
"mainEntity": [
{
"@type": "Question",
"name": "Which are the top helicopter manufacturer companies today?",
"acceptedAnswer": {
"@type": "Answer",
"text": "Today’s leading turbine helicopter manufacturers include Airbus, Bell, Enstrom, Leonardo, MD Helicopter, Robinson, and Sikorsky. Buyers shopping the pre-owned market will find additional out-of-production models available, including those produced by Agusta, Eurocopter, and others.Popular piston helicopters are built by Enstrom (F-28F and 280FX), Guimbal (Cabri G2), Robinson (R22 and R44 Raven) and Schweizer (300C). Again, buyers shopping the pre-owned piston helicopter market will find additional out-of-production models available, including, for example, the Bell 47."
}
},
{
"@type": "Question",
"name": "What are helicopters used for?",
"acceptedAnswer": {
"@type": "Answer",
"text": "Turbine helicopters are popular with corporations needing business and VVIP transportation. High-net-worth-individuals also own these aircraft as personal transportation. Some of the other roles and industries Turbine Helicopters are commonly utilized in are police work, medevac, aerial surveillance, offshore, media, tourism and more. Meanwhile, Piston helicopters are very popular with flight schools. They are also used for personal, owner-flown transportation, and are useful for certain types of surveillance work, tourism, site inspection, and news gathering."
}
},
{
"@type": "Question",
"name": "How much do helicopters cost?",
"acceptedAnswer": {
"@type": "Answer",
"text": "Buyers seeking a pre-owned turbine helicopter can expect an average ask price of $1.465m, according to JETNET data (April 2022) which accounts for new and used helicopter prices. The highest ask price in July 2021 was $9.950m. Piston helicopters, meanwhile, can cost anywhere between under $68k up to approximately $708k (per JETNET), "
}
}
]
}
]
}
</script><script type="application/ld+json">
{
"@context": "https://schema.org",

}
]
}

},

"url": "https://www.avbuyer.com/aircraft/helicopter/turbine/leonardo/aw109s-grand/373419",
"description": "2010 Leonardo A109S Grand\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nThis well-maintained aircraft combines proven performance with modern capability, offering a strong balance of speed, payload, and efficiency. Configured for executive transport, it is an ideal platform for both private and commercial operations.\r\nPerfomance & Component Status\r\nThe G-EMHN benefits from the highly desirable 4,000-hour TBO engine upgrade, significantly reducing long-term lifecycle costs.\r\n\r\nEngines: Twin PW207C engines with balanced hours and significant time remaining (667.9 hours each).\r\nMain Gearbox: 1,467.9 hours remaining.\r\nTail Gearbox: 1,791.4 hours remaining.\r\nMain Rotor Blades: Extensive life remaining with 5,467.9 hours on each blade. \r\n\r\n \r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n "
},
{

},
